# savetokens.tips

> Token-saving techniques for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex), characterized like a component datasheet. Measured figures come from per-command raw-versus-filtered token deltas logged by the RTK proxy: 82.5% typical reduction across 93,501 proxied commands, snapshot 2026-07-19. Estimated figures carry no counterfactual and are marked as such.

## Pages

- [Datasheet ST-0001](https://savetokens.tips/): all characterized techniques, measured versus estimated figures, per-command savings, FAQ
- [Application note AN-0001](https://savetokens.tips/guide): token discipline guide, /clear versus /compact versus new session, caveman response style, agent copy blocks, model routing, subagent economics
- [About](https://savetokens.tips/about): who characterizes the data and how the figures are measured
